_comment: Maps pipeline runs to StatsBomb matches for event-detection validation. Copy an entry under 'runs', fill in the StatsBomb match details, and run: python tools/validate_against_statsbomb.py --config configs/validation_matches.json

_fields.name: Label used for the report files.
_fields.run_dir: Pipeline output dir containing events.json (e.g. data/insights/<run>).
_fields.clip_start_s: Match-clock seconds at the clip's first frame (kickoff offset). 0 if the clip starts at kickoff.
_fields.statsbomb_events: Path to a StatsBomb events/<match_id>.json file (offline path, preferred).
_fields.statsbomb_match_id: Alternative to statsbomb_events: match id fetched via the optional statsbombpy package.
_fields.period: Optional: restrict StatsBomb events to this half (1 or 2) when the clip is within one period.
_fields.tolerance_s: Time window (seconds) for two events to be considered the same. Default 3.0.
_fields.team_map: Optional StatsBomb-team-name -> 'home'/'away' map, enabling team-aware scoring.
_fields.match_teams: Require team agreement for a match. Default false (our team-0/1 labels are arbitrary).
